emails.subject: I know its annoying but
emails.body: I know its annoying but My contract is in Kitchen and I have done the drugs test, benefits etc in Nettelton. can you sort thanks. Louise Kitchen Chief Operating Officer Enron Americas Tel: 713 853 3488 Fax: 713 646 2308

emails.subject: Re: I know its annoying but
emails.body: Re: I know its annoying but Can you be nettelton kitchen? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL> Sent: Sun Feb 03 19:54:58 2002

emails.subject: RE: I know its annoying but
emails.body: RE: I know its annoying but Good idea let's try for that in their systems. Its really only a question of my pay checks and expenses bouncing. Had a crap week-end filling in my SEC background questionnaire hope yours was better. To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: FW: Fw: I know its annoying but
emails.body: FW: Fw: I know its annoying but Did you do all this over weekend?
